prediction.reasoning: For a large-cap telecom stock like AT&T (T), daily price movements are typically modest due to its stable, dividend-focused nature and low volatility. Applied to the current price of $27.88, this generates confidence intervals assuming normal distribution of returns with slight upward bias reflecting general market drift.
